en: Aping, are you home?
Yes, come on in.
Aping , are you home?

ab: uka Aping lumah cia, Ciang saikin, mabis isu naispalinutu i? natahuan ku Aping mais minsumain.
ch: B:Aping不在家耶!我是Ciang，有什麼事嗎? 回來我會轉告Aping。
en: Aping is not at home. I am Ciang. What can I do for you? I will let him know when he comes back.
Who are you?

ab: hudaspingaz, kaimin hai Ciang mas Aping! tauav ilavan.
ch: B:奶奶，我們是Ciang 和 Aping，幫我們開門!
en: Grandma, we are Ciang and Aping, please open the door for us.
Who is it?
I am Ciang, I am here for Umas.
Grandma, I am here to see you.

ab: malbuntuin kasu nitu tantungu, malaspu saikin masu.
ch: A:你好久沒來了，我好想念你。
en: You haven’t been here for a long time. I missed you so much.

ab: Aping minsumainik kilim su namapahainan ta.
en: Aping, I am here to play with you.
Come on in! I have been waiting for you for a long time.

ab: tanama maus inak sinsuaz tu utan tan!
ch: A:這是我種的地瓜，吃吃看!
en: This is the sweet potato I grow. Try it!
The sweet potato is so sweet.

ab: tuzainin! tanama maus inak sinsuaz tu kakaunun tan.
ch: A:過來!這是我種的水果，吃看看。
en: Come here! These are the fruits I grow. You should try it.

ab: tuza tu madavus a sinsuaz su kakaununan.
en: The fruit tastes sweet.

ab: mal-anuhua! tanama maus inka sinsuaz tu iuci acipul tan!
ch: A:請坐! 這是我種的有機玉米吃看看!
en: Take a seat! You should try some organic corn that I grow.
Wow! The corn tastes so sweet.
Do you want some oranges?

ab: ni saikin mahtu maus izuk, namaunik lingku cin.
ch: B:我不能吃橘子，我吃蘋果就好。
en: I can’t eat oranges. I will have some apples instead.
Would you want some cookies?
Sure, I like it very much.

ab: masalad saikis kakaunun tan. nakaunun su
en: Let me peel the fruit for you.
Thank you. This fruit is so juicy.
I will bring you some water.
Thank you.
Enjoy yourself. I cooked a lot of dishes.
Oh! It smells good and looks delicious.
Enjoy yourself. There is a lot more.
I’ll make myself at home then.

ab: ik-supaha maun i, supahang andi pandianan.
en: Enjoy yourself. There are plenty here.

ab: suhaphin kinaunan ku, nin mahtu kuhna maun.
ch: B:我吃了好多，不能再吃了。
en: I ate a lot and couldn’t eat any more.
